title.zh: BurpSuite验证码识别绕过插件实践

description.zh: 本文档介绍了如何使用开源项目 `NEW_xp_CAPTCHA` 搭建本地验证码识别服务，并在 BurpSuite 中通过自定义 Python 扩展插件实现验证码自动识别与爆破。内容包括服务端部署、Burp 扩展加载、`Intruder` 配置以及实际识别成功率分析。
description.en: This document describes how to set up a local CAPTCHA recognition service using the open-source project `NEW_xp_CAPTCHA` and integrate it with BurpSuite via a custom Python extension to automate CAPTCHA solving during brute-force attacks. It covers server deployment, Burp extension loading, `Intruder` configuration, and an analysis of real-world recognition success rates.

content.zh: 克隆并启动 `NEW_xp_CAPTCHA` 验证码识别服务

annotation.zh: 从 GitHub 克隆 `NEW_xp_CAPTCHA` 仓库，安装依赖 `muggle_ocr`，并启动本地识别服务器，默认监听 `0.0.0.0:8899`。
annotation.en: Clone the `NEW_xp_CAPTCHA` repository from GitHub, install the `muggle_ocr` dependency, and start the local recognition server listening on `0.0.0.0:8899` by default.

codeBlocks.code:
$ git clone https://github.com/smxiazi/NEW_xp_CAPTCHA.git
$ cd NEW_xp_CAPTCHA
$ python3 -m pip install muggle_ocr
$ python3 server.py
Starting server, listen at: 0.0.0.0:8899

content.zh: BurpSuite 加载 Python 扩展 `xp_CAPTCHA.py`

annotation.zh: 在 BurpSuite 的 `Extender` → `Extensions` 中添加类型为 `Python` 的扩展，选择 `xp_CAPTCHA.py` 文件。需提前安装 Jython `2.7.1` 或更高版本的 Jar 包。
annotation.en: Add a `Python`-type extension in BurpSuite's `Extender` → `Extensions` tab, selecting the `xp_CAPTCHA.py` file. Ensure Jython `2.7.1` or higher Jar is installed beforehand.

content.zh: 配置 `Intruder` 攻击参数与验证码 Payload 生成器
content.en: Configure `Intruder` Attack Parameters and CAPTCHA Payload Generator

annotation.zh: 在 `Intruder` 模块中设置攻击类型，并为验证码参数选择 `Payload Type` 为 `Extension-generated`，指定生成器为 `xp_CAPTCHA`。同时在请求头中添加 `xiapao` 字段，其值为验证码图片的生成 URL。注意：爆破时需设置单线程（`Number of threads = 1`）。
annotation.en: In `Intruder` module, set the attack type, and for the CAPTCHA parameter choose `Payload Type` as `Extension-generated` and select `xp_CAPTCHA` as the generator. Additionally, add the `xiapao` header with the URL that generates the CAPTCHA image. Note: Set `Number of threads = 1` during the attack.

codeBlocks.code:
Payload Set for CAPTCHA parameter:
- Payload Type: Extension-generated
- Select Generator: xp_CAPTCHA
- Number of threads: 1

content.zh: 开始爆破并观察识别成功率
content.en: Start Attack and Observe Recognition Success Rate

annotation.zh: 以单线程模式启动攻击。实际渗透测试中发现，若验证码包含混淆字符，识别成功率极低，仅为约 `0.01%`（`18/1795`）。
annotation.en: Start the attack with a single thread. In real-world penetration tests, the recognition success rate is extremely low (approx `0.01%` or `18/1795`) when the CAPTCHA includes obfuscated characters.
